Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents an uploaded and parsed text document.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this document.

title.description: The filename or title of the document.

content.description: The extracted text of the document.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the document was added.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a message sent in the chat.

uid.description: The UID of the user who sent or received the message.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

documents.description: Collection storing documents uploaded by users.

messages.description: Collection storing chat messages for users.
